content.en:
"If the Tianyan Spear is forged, my strength will increase a lot, and if I condense the high-level realm gods of the seven Eternal Realm Spirits, I can easily suppress the other party, unless the other party also has the Supreme Realm Weapon!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now that there is a method of forging the Tianyan spear, the next step is to forge this supreme realm soldier.

Materials, he has now, and enough.

There is also a method of forging.

But he still lacked one thing, and that was a flame that could calcine the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

The Celestial Vein Demon Gold is very tough, and the same is true for other materials, if you want to calcine the Celestial Vein Demon Gold and other materials and cast them into the Tianyan Spear, you need a very terrifying flame to do it.

Ye Tian specially went to check, and the flames that could cast the Supreme Realm Soldiers were very rare, and almost all of them were in the hands of some top forces.

Therefore, many high-level realm gods have no way to cast supreme realm soldiers themselves, and will ask some high-level realm gods who are good at making supreme realm soldiers to cast, but the price paid is unimaginable, often 05 has to pay several times the price of the material or even ten times the price of the material.

After all, there is only the material, there is no method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldier, and there is no flame to smelt the material, so naturally you have to pay so much price.

Even, there has to be a way, ordinary high-level realm gods, go to find people, and no one will help.

For example, in the Eastern Wu Realm, there are only six top forces that have the power to refine the Supreme Realm Soldiers, but it is extremely difficult to ask these six forces to help refine the Supreme Realm Soldiers.

If it doesn't matter, even if the other party agrees, there is a high probability that they will directly swallow the materials and the price paid, and then give a reply that the refining has failed, and there is no way to trouble the top forces.

For example, Ye Tian, if he went to the top forces to refine, they also agreed, but the top forces saw that Ye Tian was only a middle-level cultivator in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and he had no background, so maybe they would fool him, and then say that the refining failed, but in fact, they didn't help him refine at all.

And he paid ten times more and got nothing.

This was also the reason why Ye Tian would not find a way to find a high-level realm god of that top force to refine the supreme realm soldiers.

"I can only find the flame to refine the Supreme Realm Soldier by myself!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, in the following days, he focused on letting the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce look for this flame, and he was also trying to find a way to inquire about the flame.

After many years of investigation, he really found the news of a flame, but this flame has great side effects, and it is more suitable for demon seeds.

【Sky Swallowing Demon Flame】

This kind of flame can be used to refine the Supreme Realm Soldiers, but it makes even the Eternal Dao Seeds of the high-level realm gods unbearable, and it is easy to turn into a demonic seed.

When it comes to the cultivation of a high-level realm god, it is more difficult to transform into a demon seed, but the Heaven Devouring Demon Flame can make a high-level realm god and demon seed.

Therefore, the high-level realm gods did not dare to use the Heaven Devouring Demon Flame to refine the Supreme Realm Soldiers.

But Ye Tian didn't worry about the Heaven Devouring Demon Flame, and the Sky Devouring Demon Flame was more suitable for refining the Supreme Realm Soldier Tianyan Spear, after all, the Tianyan Spear needed a lot of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

The side effects of the Sky Devouring Demon Flame were very large, so Ye Tiancai had a chance to get his hands on it.

......

Eastern Ukrainian Boundary.

The top force - Jiehe Mountain.

Ye Tian came here, and he wanted to make a deal with a high-level realm god in Jiehe Mountain to buy the Sky Devouring Demon Flame.

Soon, he met with the high-level realm god of Jiehe Mountain, the god of the Northern Underworld.

"Ye Heaven Realm God, are you going to buy my Sky Devouring Demon Flame?"

The Northern Underworld God asked.

"Yes, Northern Underworld God, I want to buy the Sky Devouring Demon Flame!" Ye Tian nodded.

"A million Eternal Boundary Stones, nothing less, if you can take it out, take it away from the Sky Devouring Demon Flame!"

"Good!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand and took out a million Eternal Boundary Stones, all of which he had recently asked the Terran Holy Kingdom to sell various resources, so that he had collected a million Eternal Boundary Stones.

Seeing that Ye Tian had really taken out a million Eternal Realm Stones, the Northern Underworld God was immediately extremely surprised.

Because even if it is a powerful force, it can't take out a million Eternal Boundary Stones, unless it sells the entire family business of a powerful force, it can get a million Eternal Boundary Stones!

"Here you go!"

The Northern Underworld God took out a black stone, which was not actually a real stone, but a black stone formed by the superposition of countless prohibitions, and the Sky Devouring Demon Flame was sealed inside.

Otherwise, the Northern Underworld God would not dare to directly hold the Heaven Devouring Demon Flame!

Immediately, Ye Tian and the Northern Underworld God exchanged transactions.

Wow!

Ye Tian left, and the gods of the Northern Underworld did not do anything to kill people and oversell goods.

But from beginning to end, the gods of the Northern Underworld did not do anything to him, and no other gods of the world did anything to him.

"It seems that the Northern Underworld God is not going to do it for a million Eternal Boundary Stones!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Terran Holy Country. []

Ye Tian is back.

In an instant, he broke the prohibition on the black stone little by little.

Gradually, black light appeared on this stone, and the whole stone spread out layer by layer like a lotus.

Ten floors!

100 layers!

Mille-feuille!

10,000 layers!

It was enough to uncover hundreds of thousands of layers of prohibitions, and only then did he see the Sky Devouring Demon Flame.

In an instant, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed swallowed the Sky Devouring Demon Flame into it, and used the Eternal Dao Demon Seed Demon Seed to breed 333 to nourish the Sky Devouring Demon Flame, so that he could completely control the Sky Devouring Demon Flame, otherwise there would be no way to use the Sky Devouring Demon Flame to refine the Supreme Realm Soldier!

Soon.

Ye Tian completely controlled the Sky Devouring Demon Flame.

"The Sky Devouring Demon Flame is here, and the materials and the method of forging the Supreme Realm Soldier are also available, and then you can refine the Supreme Realm Soldier Tianyan Spear!"

Refining Supreme Realm Soldiers is very dangerous.

Therefore, Ye Tian specially built a void to refine the Supreme Realm Soldier Tianyan Spear to prevent it from affecting the Terran Holy Kingdom.

......

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian manipulated the Heaven Devouring Demon Flame to smelt various materials such as Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, and many materials were refined by him one by one, and then forged according to the forging method of the Tianyan Spear.

Refining the Tianyan Spear consumes a lot of money, and it takes a long time.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's copy body was a little unable to hold on, after all, this was refining the Supreme Realm Soldier, and it actually required the cultivation of a high-level realm god to be able to support it.

Ye Tian's combat power was comparable to that of a high-level realm god, which did not mean that his cultivation and durability had reached the level of a high-level realm god.

Therefore, he gradually couldn't support it anymore.

However, when his copy body couldn't support it, his other copy bodies took over and continued to refine the Tianyan Spear.
